info.name: Spesenerfassung
info.description: Expense tracking app for Makerspace Reinach. Features: - Submit expenses with receipt uploads (PDF, JPG, PNG, max 1MB) - Camera capture for receipts on mobile - Nextcloud SSO authentication - Configurable categories and approval thresholds - Two-step approval: President (for >threshold) and Treasurer - Email notifications on status changes - Full audit trail with rejection reasons - Responsive UI for desktop and mobile
info.author: Makerspace Reinach
